category_sources: source_facts.description says Multi-Target Application build tool for Cloud Applications; SAP Help Portal describes Cloud MTA Build Tool as building deployment-ready MTA archives.
display_name_sources: Official SAP GitHub project is cloud-mta-build-tool; SAP Help Portal title is "The Cloud MTA Build Tool (MBT)".
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official SAP GitHub Pages documentation; SAP Help Portal has the official MBT documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/SAP/cloud-mta-build-tool; per instructions repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: source_facts.description references MTA build tool for cloud applications; SAP Help Portal describes creating .mtar deployment archives for multitarget applications.
